ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT(ISPICKVAL(Competition__c, "Unknown")) && NOT(ISPICKVAL(Competition__c, "Not using a competitor")) && ISCHANGED(Status__c) && ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Completed") && ( ISPICKVAL(Competition__c,"") || ISBLANK( Competitor_Product__c ) || ISBLANK(text( Primary_Use_Case__c )) ) && ( RecordType.DeveloperName ="AE" || RecordType.DeveloperName ="SDR" || RecordType.DeveloperName ="MIR_Handover" )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please populate the following fields to Complete the Meeting: 'Using a competitor', 'Competitor Product', 'Primary Use Case'
